title: Reset a locked VPN account
user_task: An employee reports that their VPN account is locked after too many failed logins and they need remote access restored before a customer call.
repository_context: Enterprise ICT ticketing workflow. Tickets may be routed to access-management, endpoint support, or human escalation queues. Internal policy requires identity checks for access resets, and KB evidence should justify the route.
acceptance_criteria: Identify this as an access-management ticket
Assign an appropriate business priority
Require identity verification before reset
Use KB evidence to justify the route
Record structured action-log entries and receipts for the executor step
Persist the ticket state and approval status in the ticket DB snapshot
Either queue an automated reset or escalate to a human approver
risk_notes: Do not reset access without verification
Do not close the ticket before confirming next action

title: Provision a new-hire access bundle
user_task: HR submits a request for a new employee who needs an email account, VPN access, and access to the finance shared drive before their start date.
repository_context: Enterprise ICT onboarding workflow. Some requests can be batched automatically, but finance-drive access requires explicit approval and audit logging. KB articles separate standard onboarding from approval-gated access.
acceptance_criteria: Classify this as onboarding / provisioning
Split standard access from approval-gated access
Use KB evidence for both routing and approval gating
Record action-log evidence for both standard and approval-gated steps
Persist approval-gated status in the ticket DB snapshot
Route finance-drive access for approval
Record an auditable execution summary
risk_notes: Do not grant finance access without approval
Do not lose the start-date dependency

title: Triage a branch-office printer outage
user_task: A finance employee in a branch office cannot print invoices and reports that the shared printer shows offline for the whole team.
repository_context: Enterprise ICT incident workflow. Tickets may be resolved by a knowledge-base action, routed to local support, or escalated to network / facilities teams depending on blast radius. KB evidence should distinguish single-user issues from team-wide outages.
acceptance_criteria: Classify this as an incident rather than a simple request
Recognize that multiple users may be affected
Route to the correct support queue
Use KB evidence when deciding whether the issue is shared or single-user
Record action-log evidence for escalation and notification steps
Persist the escalated incident state in the ticket DB snapshot
Decide whether to notify humans immediately
risk_notes: Do not treat a team-wide outage as a single-user issue
Prefer escalation when service impact is unclear
